name: degoog-plugins
description: Däny's degoog extensions — privacy-friendly plugins for a self-hosted homelab.
author: Däny

plugins.name: Spell Check (LanguageTool)
plugins.description: Intercepts search queries and corrects spelling using LanguageTool. A privacy-friendly, non-Russian alternative to the Yandex Speller plugin. Backend is configurable, so you can point it at your own self-hosted LanguageTool instance.

plugins.name: Time
plugins.description: Show the current time in any city or timezone. Fully offline — uses the built-in IANA timezone database (~350 zones), so cities like Rome, Madrid or Cairo resolve automatically and no query ever leaves your network. Includes German-language aliases.
